title: podophyllum hexandrum var. bhootanense
intro: Podophyllum hexandrum var. bhootanense, also known as Himalayan Mayapple or Bhutanese Mayapple, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antineoplastic activities. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and cancer, due to its health benefits such as anti-cancer and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Podophyllum hexandrum var. bhootanense include extracts, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions, but its usage should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to its toxicity.
